headline: While Amazon, Microsoft, Google Struggle With AI On Land — China Looks To The Sea
summary: The AI race is running into an unexpected wall—and it's not chips or capital. It's water, power, and local resistance. As Amazon.com, Inc., Microsoft Corporation, and Alphabet Inc. push to expand data center capacity, investors are starting to question whether the physical footprint of AI is becoming the real constraint. headline: Cloud AI Today - Enhancing AI: ASF Launches Responsible AI Initiative
summary: The Apache Software Foundation (ASF) has launched a Responsible AI Initiative to enhance the open-source technologies essential for modern AI systems. This initiative, aiming for a $10 million funding goal, begins with donations from Anthropic and Alpha-Omega. It focuses on strengthening the infrastructure that supports AI, ensuring security, transparency, and responsible governance of ASF projects. The initiative also seeks to expand community engagement with learning and collaboration...

content.title: Cloud AI Today - Enhancing AI: ASF Launches Responsible AI Initiative
content.summary: The Apache Software Foundation (ASF) has launched a Responsible AI Initiative to enhance the open-source technologies essential for modern AI systems. This initiative, aiming for a $10 million funding goal, begins with donations from Anthropic and Alpha-Omega. It focuses on strengthening the infrastructure that supports AI, ensuring security, transparency, and responsible governance of ASF projects. The initiative also seeks to expand community engagement with learning and collaboration...

headline: Is Microsoft Stock A Smarter Buy Than Google After Its Massive 250% Rally?
summary: Alphabet's (GOOG) stock is up by over 250% since the beginning of 2023. That’s great for Google. But wait a minute, Microsoft’s (MSFT) stock is up a meager 56% during the same period. Hard to believe, but Alphabet’s stock is up more than 4x Microsoft’s stock. This, despite the fact that Microsoft’s revenue growth for the 2023-2025 period stood at 44%, compared to just 31% for Google. Does that make sense? We don’t think it does, and believe Microsoft presents a compelling valuation at current le

content.title: Is Microsoft Stock A Smarter Buy Than Google After Its Massive 250% Rally?
content.summary: Alphabet's (GOOG) stock is up by over 250% since the beginning of 2023. That’s great for Google. But wait a minute, Microsoft’s (MSFT) stock is up a meager 56% during the same period. Hard to believe, but Alphabet’s stock is up more than 4x Microsoft’s stock. headline: 3 Software Stocks Citi Just Downgraded as Slump Refuses to Let Up
summary: As first-quarter earnings loom “amidst parabolic AI revenue inflections at foundational model leaders,”  Citi  Research analysts expect the concerns around the durability of business models for software-as-a-service companies to intensify in the months ahead.  The rating readjustment reflects Citi’s house view on software.  From their perspective, “investors will struggle to get comfortable with the sector at large” until they see more meaningful growth acceleration, more clarity on focus areas of developers like OpenAI and Anthropic as they creep into the enterprise software market.

content.title: 3 Software Stocks Citi Just Downgraded as Slump Refuses to Let Up
content.summary: As first-quarter earnings loom “amidst parabolic AI revenue inflections at foundational model leaders,”  Citi  Research analysts expect the concerns around the durability of business models for software-as-a-service companies to intensify in the months ahead.  The rating readjustment reflects Citi’s house view on software.  From their perspective, “investors will struggle to get comfortable with the sector at large” until they see more meaningful growth acceleration, more clarity on focus areas of developers like OpenAI and Anthropic as they creep into the enterprise software market.

headline: eBay Joins SAIL As Stock Trades Below Targets And Valuation Estimate
summary: eBay has joined the new Shared AI License Foundation as a board observer, alongside companies such as Anthropic, Genentech, IBM, Meta, and Microsoft. The initiative aims to encourage shared development of core AI technologies that could influence how eBay and other firms use AI in their products and services. Investors fretted the rise of AI agents would dampen demand for offerings from legacy software providers.  The rating readjustment reflects Citi’s house view on software.

content.title: 3 Software Stocks Citi Just Downgraded as Slump Refuse to Let Up
content.summary: As first-quarter earnings loom “amidst parabolic AI revenue inflections at foundational model leaders,”  Citi  Research analysts expect the concerns around the durability of business models for software-as-a-service companies to intensify in the months ahead.  Investors fretted the rise of AI agents would dampen demand for offerings from legacy software providers.  The rating readjustment reflects Citi’s house view on software.

headline: Microsoft’s New AI Alliances Reframe Patent, Security And Enterprise Growth Story
summary: Microsoft (NasdaqGS:MSFT) has launched the Shared AI License Foundation (SAIL), a broad AI patent sharing framework aimed at collaborative foundation model development. The company is also leading Project Glasswing, a joint cybersecurity initiative with other major technology players to secure software supply chains in the age of advanced AI models. Microsoft has expanded its partnership with Publicis Groupe to deploy an end to end, agentic AI driven marketing stack across global operations...
